Authorization: Bearer REDACTED

Connection: close

Content-Type: application/proto

Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED

X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true

X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/correlation.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Stable correlation IDs for flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport hashlib\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _canonical_endpoints(\r\n    src_ip: str, src_port: int, dst_ip: str, dst_port: int\r\n) -> tuple[str, str]:\r\n    \"\"\"Return (ep1, ep2) with ep1 <= ep2 lexicographically (ep = 'ip:port').\"\"\"\r\n    ep1 = f\"{src_ip}:{src_port}\"\r\n    ep2 = f\"{dst_ip}:{dst_port}\"\r\n    return (ep1, ep2) if ep1 <= ep2 else (ep2, ep1)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_flow_id(\r\n    src_ip: str,\r\n    src_port: int,\r\n    dst_ip: str,\r\n    dst_port: int,\r\n    protocol: int,\r\n    capture_file_id: str,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable hash of 5-tuple + capture file id. Deterministic across runs (same flow from either direction).\"\"\"\r\n    ep1, ep2 = _canonical_endpoints(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    canonical = f\"{ep1}|{ep2}|{protocol}|{capture_file_id}\"\r\n    return hashlib.sha256(canonical.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id: str, transaction_index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/1.1: flow_id + sequential index.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_{transaction_index}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id: str, stream_id: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/2 or gRPC: flow_id + stream_id.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_s{stream_id}\"\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:14:44 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

{}
```

Deterministic across runs (same flow from either direction).\"\"\"\r\n    ep1, ep2 = _canonical_endpoints(src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port)\r\n    canonical = f\"{ep1}|{ep2}|{protocol}|{capture_file_id}\"\r\n    return hashlib.sha256(canonical.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http1(flow_id: str, transaction_index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/1.1: flow_id + sequential index.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_{transaction_index}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id: str, stream_id: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Transaction ID for HTTP/2 or gRPC: flow_id + stream_id.\"\"\"\r\n    return f\"{flow_id}_s{stream_id}\"\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
